reviews.comment:
Excelente atención !! Lo más destacado es que dan alojamiento a los perritos estos  pasean por el lugar,son muy cariñosos y dan la bienvenida. Siempre que estoy de paso me reciben con amor y cariño ! ☺️ P/D Tienen servicio de agua caliente gratis, precios accesibles y los sanitarios siempre están súper limpios. La atención de parte del local es súper amable y en todo momento 👏

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service!! The best part is that they provide lodging for dogs; they roam the place, are very affectionate, and always welcome you. Whenever I'm passing through, they greet me with love and affection! ☺️ P.S. They have free hot water, affordable prices, and the restrooms are always spotless. The staff is incredibly friendly and helpful at all times. 👏
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQxelpuZWNBEAE

reviews.comment:
Pase a comprar algo de comer volviendo de Rawson, las chicas de la noche unas copadas, Victoria me saco un rico sanguche de mila y uno de salame al toque, ojalá les llenen el frasco de la propina y espero que la señora que se quedo con el auto haya podido ser atendida. :)

(Translated by Google)
I stopped by to get something to eat on my way back from Rawson. The girls were really nice that night. Victoria brought me a delicious mila sandwich and a salami sandwich. I hope they fill up the tip jar, and I hope the lady who kept the car was able to get help. :)
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNIbDV1cUZ3EAE

reviews.comment:
La parrilla libre de ACA, excelente atención, excelente la comida, la carne super tierna , las ensaladas muy frescas, súper económico $14.500 por persona, bebida a parte pero es grande para compartir. De todos los lugares que he parado en ruta el mejor de los mejores 10/10. Si tuviera 10 estrellas se las daría. Los baños impecables, la limpieza excelente!

(Translated by Google)
ACA's all-you-can-eat grill is excellent, the service is superb, the food is amazing, the meat is incredibly tender, the salads are very fresh, and it's super affordable at $14,500 per person (drinks are extra, but it's a large spread perfect for sharing). Of all the places I've stopped on my road trip, this is the best of the best, 10/10. If I had 10 stars, I'd give it them all. The bathrooms are spotless, and the cleanliness is impeccable!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNIc182V053EAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente!!! Buenas atención, comida y ambiente. Recomiendo pedir en Sandwich o al plato como picada, jamón crudo y queso de máquina, riquísimo!!! El lomito completo también es espectacular. Como lugar de parada al paso es súper recomendable. En cuanto a los baños, están muy limpios y completos. El personal de la gasolinería también es muy amable.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent!!! Great service, food, and atmosphere. I recommend ordering the sandwich or the platter with the prosciutto and sliced ​​cheese—delicious!!! The steak sandwich is also spectacular. It's a highly recommended place to stop on the go. The restrooms are very clean and well-equipped. The gas station staff is also very friendly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNIX2RUNnlnRRAB
